title: Presence snapshot — current-state RPC, not event replay
summary: Specifies that presence MUST be populated via a current-state RPC query at Subscribe open (not event replay), defining presence semantics, single server-decided focus context, LOCATION-only resolver scope for this bead, and exemption from the I-PRIV-1 temporal floor.
notes: Status: Draft (not Accepted); classified as SPEC per manifest override — contains explicit design decisions (D-1..D-4) analogous to ADR content but framed as a technical specification for a presence RPC/wire contract.
